Your craft deserves
an exceptional portfolio.

mentions.title: Legal Notice
mentions.subtitle: In accordance with the provisions of French Law n° 2004-575 of June 21, 2004 on confidence in the digital economy.

fields.address_value: 3 RUE de la fontaine, 17210 Saint-Palais-de-Négrignac, FRANCE

host.title: Hosting
host.content: This website is hosted by the Publisher on its own servers located at the registered address: 3 RUE de la fontaine, 17210 Saint-Palais-de-Négrignac, FRANCE.

ip.title: Intellectual property
ip.content: This entire website is subject to French and international legislation on copyright and intellectual property. All reproduction rights are reserved, including for downloadable documents and iconographic and photographic representations.

cgu.title: Terms of Service
cgu.subtitle: Rules governing the use of the Eaglet service. By accessing the site, you agree to these terms.

s1.title: 1. Purpose
s1.content: These Terms of Service define the terms under which Eaglet makes its services available and the conditions under which Users may use the service.

s2.title: 2. Access
s2.content: The site is freely accessible from anywhere to any User with internet access. All costs incurred by the User to access the service (hardware, software, internet connection, etc.) are the User's responsibility.

s3.title: 3. User responsibility
s3.p1: The User is responsible for risks associated with the use of their login credentials and password. The password must remain secret. In case of disclosure, the Publisher accepts no liability.
s3.p2: The User agrees to communicate respectfully towards others and the law, and not to disrupt the use that other users may make of the site.

s4.title: 4. Intellectual property
s4.content: Trademarks, logos, signs, and all site content (texts, images, audio…) are protected by the Intellectual Property Code, particularly copyright law.

s5.title: 5. Personal data
s5.content: Users have the right to access, modify, delete, and object to the processing of their personal data. This right may be exercised through their personal account or via the contact form.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Protection of your personal data and respect for your privacy.

collect.title: Data collection
collect.intro: We collect only the data strictly necessary for the service to function:
items: Billing information (via Stripe — no card numbers stored)

use.title: Use of data
items: Manage your access to the service
Send communications you have opted into
use.no_sell: We never sell personal data to third parties.

rights.title: Your rights (GDPR)
rights.intro: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:
items: Right to erasure (right to be forgotten)
rights.exercise: You may exercise these rights through your personal account or by contacting us.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: This site uses only technically essential cookies required for the service to function (session, authentication). These do not require prior consent.
